controls.title: Principles relating to processing of personal data
controls.text: Personal data shall be processed lawfully, fairly and transparently; collected for specified, explicit and legitimate purposes; adequate, relevant and limited; accurate; kept no longer than necessary; processed with appropriate security.
controls.evidence_expectation: Data processing register; ROPA; data retention schedule
controls.assessment_procedure: Review ROPA completeness; verify retention policy applied; check lawful basis documented for each processing activity

controls.title: Information to be provided where personal data collected from data subject
controls.text: At the time personal data is collected, the controller shall provide identity and contact details, purposes and legal basis, recipients, transfers, retention period, rights information, and complaint procedures.
controls.evidence_expectation: Privacy notice/policy; collection-point screenshot; notice version history
controls.assessment_procedure: Verify notice contains all Art.13 elements; confirm it is presented before or at collection; check language accessibility

controls.title: Lawful basis — consent
controls.text: Processing is lawful where the data subject has given consent to the processing of his or her personal data for one or more specific purposes.
controls.evidence_expectation: Consent mechanism UI; consent log records; withdrawal process documentation
controls.assessment_procedure: Verify consent is freely given, specific, informed, unambiguous; check withdrawal is as easy as giving; review consent records

controls.title: Right of access by the data subject
controls.text: The data subject shall have the right to obtain confirmation as to whether personal data concerning them is being processed, and access to that data and supplementary information.
controls.evidence_expectation: Subject access request (SAR) procedure; SAR response samples; SLA documentation
controls.assessment_procedure: Test SAR process end-to-end; verify 1-month response SLA; check scope of data provided

controls.title: Security of processing
controls.text: The controller and processor shall implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to ensure a level of security appropriate to the risk, including pseudonymisation, encryption, confidentiality, integrity, availability, and resilience.
controls.evidence_expectation: Security policy; encryption implementation evidence; BCDR documentation; penetration test reports
controls.assessment_procedure: Review security controls against risk assessment; verify encryption at rest and in transit; check BCDR tested

controls.title: Notification of a personal data breach to the supervisory authority
controls.text: In the case of a personal data breach, the controller shall notify the competent supervisory authority within 72 hours of becoming aware of it.
controls.evidence_expectation: Breach response procedure; breach register; prior notifications (if any); detection capability evidence
controls.assessment_procedure: Verify breach response plan; test detection-to-notification timeline; check register maintained

controls.title: Data protection impact assessment (DPIA)
controls.text: Where processing is likely to result in a high risk, the controller shall carry out an assessment of the impact of the envisaged processing operations on the protection of personal data.
controls.evidence_expectation: DPIA register; completed DPIA for high-risk processing; DPO consultation records
controls.assessment_procedure: Identify processing requiring DPIA; review completed DPIAs for completeness; verify DPO consulted
